title: B's KnockOnDoor
description: A simple plugin for roleplay. With this, you can knock on your friends' doors.
body:
### IMPORTANT
**This plugin requires SealLib: https://modrinth.com/plugin/seallib**
# B's KnockOnDoor
B's KnockOnDoor is a simple roleplay plugin that enables you to left-click any door to knock on it. Each door has a slightly different tone, making them distinguishable. *Newest version allows for windows to be knocked on.* You can also knock on trapdoors. To hear all the tones and see how it works, check out the video below.

Customization options are available in the \plugins\B_s_KnockOnDoor.yml file, where you can adjust settings to fit your needs. These settings allow you to control whether players can knock on trapdoors and whether they can knock with tools or only with empty hands etc.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/XN7txuT9qYA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### **Join my discord to report issues or just to talk and have fun:** [DISCORD](https://discord.gg/XwFqu7uahX)
